title: ZXSnake
description: Discover ZXSnake, the retro-inspired arcade snake game featuring Solo Play, local and online multiplayer, achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and unlockable themes.
summary: Classic arcade snake gameplay with modern features, rewards, and multiplayer.

images.caption: Get ready to begin your next game.
Grow your snake and beat your highest score.
Plan every move carefully as your snake grows longer.

sections.heading: Welcome to ZXSnake
paragraphs: ZXSnake is a modern take on the classic arcade snake game and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.
Collect food, grow your snake, avoid collisions, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores through Apple Game Center.

sections.heading: Getting Started
paragraphs: Begin with the How to Play guide before exploring Controls, Game Modes, and Tips & Strategy.
Once you're comfortable with the basics, continue with Achievements, Leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins to discover everything ZXSnake has to offer.

sections.heading: Part of the ZX Series
paragraphs: ZXSnake is part of the growing ZX Series, sharing BarkinMad Coins, achievements, and progression with other supported games.
If you enjoy ZXSnake, continue your arcade adventure with ZXBrick, ZXPong, and ZXSpace.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Get Started
featureShowcases.summary: Discover what makes ZXSnake exciting and where to learn more about every part of the game.
body: ZXSnake combines the simple, addictive gameplay of the classic snake game with modern features including achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and multiplayer modes.
This guide introduces the game, explains the core mechanics, and helps you discover every feature as your skills improve.
bullets: Explore achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.

image.caption: Everything begins with your first game.

featureShowcases.heading: Keep Improving
featureShowcases.summary: Every game helps you unlock achievements, climb the leaderboards, and earn BarkinMad Coins.
body: As your skills improve, you'll unlock achievements, survive longer, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores through Apple Game Center.
Whether you're chasing a new personal best or climbing the leaderboards, every game helps you become a better player.

image.caption: Every game is another opportunity to improve.
